name: Tipsy Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute peppers and onions in olive oil until almost tender.
2. Add sausage and beef to the peppers and onions. Brown the meat mixture.
3. If sausage links are easier to find without casings, use them instead of bulk hot Italian sausage.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well blended.
5. Cover and simmer for 5-6 hours.
